title: Mom Realizes Her Daughter Just Decapitated Someone
description:
You're 30 seconds away from being debt-free with PDS Debt. Get your free assessment and find the best option for you at https://pdsdebt.com/insanity

Tara McCulley sits beside her 19-year-old daughter, Kiara McCulley. Unbeknownst to her, both of their lives are about to change forever…

Just a few hours ago, Tara's daughter Kiara brutally k*lled her 18-year-old ex-girlfriend, Grace Jennings, with a 3-foot-long sword. The body lies in her mother's home just feet away.

Mrs. McCulley is completely unaware of her daughter's terrifying secrets… But this discovery of a body would just be the start…

The investigation that followed would reveal a vile teenage couple whose actions left officers, family members, and detectives in utter shock—as their horrifying crimes slowly began coming to light.
